splitByOrOutsideQuotes and splitByAnd in CQLParser are identical except for the delimiter character

THEMES AND ROOT CAUSES — with issue ID citations

THEME 1: DEPRECATED API ISLAND (8 issues)
Issues: 457d0393, b9353583, d3b36c8f, b9a139ac, d36dd055, 04a52499, f905310d, snippet_parser_passthrough_wrappers::f905310d
BlackLabSnippetParser has 5 @Deprecated methods (extractCollocateFromSnippet, extractCollocateFromMatch, extractCollocateFromPlainText, extractTokenFromSnippet) that remain the active call path in BlackLabQueryExecutor (lines 325, 431, 480, 483 confirmed by grep). The 'clean' replacement extractCollocateLemma (the new API) itself delegates back to @Deprecated extractCollocateFromSnippet (line 319-320 of BlackLabSnippetParser.java). This is an incomplete migration — the deprecated layer is still load-bearing.

THEME 2: SEF INNER DTO LEAK (7 issues)
Issues: 4506cdbc, 2c05f2f9, aa72ad03, ba683298, 18d45cfe, 374e2d8f, 5339ee62
SemanticFieldExplorer hosts 6-7 public inner result DTOs consumed by api/ layer. Javadoc itself documents need to move them (issue 5339ee62 — 'deferred indefinitely'). No false positives — DTOs confirmed present in query/ and imported by api/.

THEME 3: GOD CLASS — WordSketchApiServer (3 issues)
Issues: 9b477e82, cf2e04bd, 1dd377e7, 91924bcf, c199a2ac
WordSketchApiServer is 988 lines mixing lifecycle, routing, parsing, dispatch, JSON. POST handlers duplicate OPTIONS/method-check logic already in registerGetHandler (1dd377e7). Handler param parsing duplicated between handleSemanticFieldExplore and handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (91924bcf).

THEME 4: INTERFACE CONTRACT GAPS (7 issues)
Issues: 3b265e4c, dcfaf0fc, f80d83bc, 8508eb5f, b7918281, 68038991, 6d64ab12
findDependencyCollocations is public but absent from QueryExecutor interface (3 separate issues: 3b265e4c, dcfaf0fc, f80d83bc). ExploreOptions.executor is always null and never read — confirmed at ExplorationHandlers construction site — 3 issues (8508eb5f, b7918281, 68038991). headword vs lemma param naming in sibling interface methods (6d64ab12).

THEME 5: SILENT ERROR HANDLING (5 issues)
Issues: 0c301924, d7f6c764, 4f479844, e9f2778f, 8e239728
getTotalFrequency catches all exceptions and returns 0L silently (lines 336-350 confirmed — two issues 0c301924, d7f6c764 about same root cause). handleSemanticField and sibling handlers parse URL params without NFE guard (two issues 4f479844, e9f2778f). BlackLabConllUIndexer.errorOccurred silences failure count (8e239728).

THEME 6: LOGIC CORRECTNESS (6 issues)

Multi-seed intersection assigns first seed HashSet without defensive copy (994f324d — confirmed ExplorationHandlers.java line 247: commonCollocates = seedCollocates with no copy). findCollocations silently drops cqlPattern in fallback branch (two issues: 73de18c0, 2dcfb53e). CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens naive ']' parsing (229bc7d2). exploreByPattern fallback uses NOUN_PATTERN constant instead of caller param (adaa1423). scoreHits overflow (11fd832e).

THEME 7: TEST COVERAGE GAPS (3 issues)
Issues: e0716c7b, d81a1962, 428945ff
Zero tests for WordSketchApiServer/SketchHandlers (~700 lines handler logic), BlackLabQueryExecutor core paths, and RadialPlot SVG math.

reflect.report:
RECURRING PATTERNS vs ONE-OFFS, AND DIMENSION SIGNAL QUALITY

RECURRING PATTERNS (same root cause seen across multiple dimensions):

Pattern A — Incomplete migration (cross-cutting, 8 issues): The BlackLabSnippetParser deprecated-methods problem shows up in abstraction_fitness (457d0393), ai_generated_debt (f905310d), convention_outlier (b9353583), incomplete_migration (b9a139ac, d36dd055), naming_quality (04a52499), and contract_coherence (d3b36c8f). All 8 are the same root cause: the migration from legacy extractCollocate* to extractLemmaAt/extractHeadLemma was started but not finished. The 'clean' extractCollocateLemma still calls the deprecated method it was supposed to replace.

Pattern B — Inner DTO coupling (high signal, 7 issues): SemanticFieldExplorer inner DTOs surface in 7 different dimensions: convention_outlier (4506cdbc), cross_module_architecture (2c05f2f9), design_coherence (aa72ad03), high_level_elegance (ba683298), mid_level_elegance (18d45cfe), package_organization (374e2d8f), and incomplete_migration (5339ee62). These are not conceptually distinct problems — moving the DTOs to a model/ package resolves all 7. High confidence.

Pattern C — Interface contract gaps (high signal, 7 issues): findDependencyCollocations absent from interface surfaces in api_surface_coherence (3b265e4c), high_level_elegance (dcfaf0fc), type_safety (f80d83bc) — 3 issues, one fix. ExploreOptions.executor dead field in contract_coherence (8508eb5f), mid_level_elegance (b7918281), naming_quality (68038991) — 3 issues, one fix (remove field). headword/lemma naming in api_surface_coherence (6d64ab12).

Pattern D — Silent failures (error_consistency, 5 issues): getTotalFrequency duplicated in contract_coherence (0c301924) and error_consistency (d7f6c764). NFE guards missing duplicated in contract_coherence (4f479844) and error_consistency (e9f2778f). Each represents a distinct silent-failure mode in a separate method.

Pattern E — WordSketchApiServer god class (design_coherence + elegance, 5 issues): 9b477e82 and cf2e04bd are near-identical findings from different dimensions about the same 988-line class. POST handler CORS duplication (1dd377e7), param parsing duplication (91924bcf), and handler split boundary (c199a2ac) are related sub-problems.

ONE-OFF GENUINE ISSUES (unique problems, each needs its own fix):
- 994f324d: no-copy intersection in multi-seed (logic bug, ExplorationHandlers.java line 247)
- 73de18c0 / 2dcfb53e: findCollocations silent pattern drop (different callers, same method)
- 229bc7d2: CqlUtils naive bracket parsing (genuinely standalone)
- adaa1423: exploreByPattern fallback wrong constant (logic bug, standalone)
- 11fd832e: scoreHits maxResults * 3 overflow (logic, standalone)
- 1781299a: scoreHits default freq 1L vs 0L (logic, standalone)
- 87b29f85: duplicate Javadoc line (cosmetic, trivial)
- 9665efb2: INFO-level trace logging (easy fix)
- f00dc029: compareSeeds vs compare name mismatch in Javadoc (trivial)
- ce3f7ee5: server binds all interfaces (security, standalone but important)
- 98417113: com.sun.net.httpserver internal API (architecture decision)
- 4d8a8b87: SEF construction in WordSketchApiServer constructor (DI coupling)

DIMENSIONS WITH MOST GENUINE SIGNAL (after deduplication):
- low_level_elegance (5): each issue is distinct — CQL parser, findCollocations fallback, handler duplication, response builder sprawl, handler duplication — all genuine
- logic_clarity (4): 994f324d, 73de18c0, 2dcfb53e, adaa1423 — all verified in code, all real bugs
- test_strategy (3): three distinct untested units, no duplication

DIMENSIONS WITH HIGH DUPLICATION (mostly cross-dimensional noise):
- incomplete_migration, convention_outlier, abstraction_fitness, ai_generated_debt, high_level_elegance: all contain re-statements of the deprecated-methods and inner-DTO problems that appear already in other dimensions. These are not noise — they confirm the diagnosis — but they cluster to 2 underlying issues.

1. ALREADY FIXED (false positives in test_strategy): [124e0e04] and [e0a544f6] — SemanticFieldExplorerTest and BlackLabSnippetParserTest were added in this session by agent-28. These should be skipped/resolved, not re-done.

2. ALREADY FIXED BUT INCOMPLETE [f539885d] — input validation wrapping was claimed done but agents found lines 511-514 and 647-649 still have bare parseInt/parseDouble. The prior cluster fix missed these 2 sites.

3. GENUINE BUG PAIR [1758e9d6]/[f64a0eb4] — both describe same root cause: handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti uses raw pattern() instead of getFullPattern(seed). This is an actual correctness bug — multi-seed exploration returns wrong results for all seeds. High priority.

4. DUPLICATE CLUSTER: [82270299] and [a430f585] describe the same package-overload problem from different angles. [28bc8918] and [42e2a9a1] are downstream effects. All four require the same structural fix: extract SEF result types to their own file, move SnippetParser out of query/.

5. ROOT CAUSE CLUSTER — WordSketchApiServer god class: [e3abbf94], [dbb07399], [a798cc0e], [e78fe5ee], [25a90bd1], [160c69e5], [cb142ad1], [fb1f477c] — all point to the single 1031-line class with 11 handlers that do everything inline. Fixing this is a prerequisite for many others.

6. PATTERN MANIPULATION DUPLICATION [087f4daa]+[75ad285b] — PatternSubstitution AND GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig both independently walk CQL brackets. This is the same root cause as the dead grammar parser we already deleted. Should extract a shared token-walker utility.

7. SEVERITY GRADIENT: [1758e9d6] is a real bug affecting users. [242ad359] (am → VBD) is also a bug but in unreachable code that causes worse behavior (NN tagging). Both warrant immediate fixes.

8. STUBS CLUSTER: [0e1a2550], [19f1f331], [df7c88da] all concern getCorpusSize returning 0L. This is deliberate unfinished work — either implement or remove cleanly.

9. QUICK FIXES (<30min each): [b875d286] remove 3 INFO logs, [23a92d60] remove unused raw boolean, [68952757] add @Override, [e45cd021] remove dead denominator check, [242ad359] fix am→VBP, [cee88873] remove unused lucene.version, [a58ece02] fix fastjson artifact id, [31abc1a0] remove trivial Javadoc overload.

10. FALSE POSITIVES confirmed: [b8736d55], [59af47ae], [960a3009], [bb752027], [3d4dd6de], [81698ff1] — skip these.
